text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Another fine day of training in the books.
Right, time to tidy up the equipment and head on
home—ah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CLUNK!
WHOOOAAAA! There you... are?!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what?! Fine?! Y-you're not the monster
everyone's been talking about.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, I'm sorry for surprising you. By the by...
what's this about a monster?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
You haven't heard?! Recently, something's been
haunting this very gym!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Be careful on your way back to the dorm! I'm not
quite done here yet...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: H-heroes do not fear specters and the like! I will complete today's training regimen... I'm n-n-not just going to wallow in t-terror!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I see... Trainer, would you mind if I stayed and
trained a little longer as well?
choice_data_list: I can't let you push yourself any harder...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! Hey, Biko, mind if I join you? I'd like
to hear more about these rumors.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
O-of course! They say that every night, a skeletal
figure appears to use the leg-press machine...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear! A skeleton doing muscle training?! I
wonder what its motivation could be!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! I wonder too. If this b-bony body-builder
makes an appearance, p-perhaps we should ask it
together! A hero should exchange words before
fists!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Fine Motion joins Biko Pegasus, who's
putting on her best brave face, for some
additional training exercises.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hm. I suppose this could be considered overkill.
Still...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Oh... are you worried about me, Fine? ...If that's
the case, you can rest easy!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: If the specter emerges, I'll beat it back into the afterlife! Even if it is terrifying... No! It's precisely because it's terrifying that I must spare everyone else its terror!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you really are brave! Far beyond my
expectations...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I have underestimated you. In recognition of your
courage, I hereby bestow upon you a clover that
will grand you sacred protection.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Th-this is amazing! It's like getting a sprout
talisman from Honey Princess! I feel like I'm
positively buzzing with bravery now! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. Let's hope that it keeps you out of
harm's way. Good night.
